## Type of change

- [ ] Schema change (`/schemas/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/<scope>-<description>` (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Issue referenced in PR description
- [ ] Samples or tests included where behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or `node_modules/` committed
- [ ] `README.md` / `schemas/README.md` updated if user-facing
